notes: Sprint 1 Combat Readability now has explicit acceptance coverage for active-pilot survivability, swamp-pressure progression, readable hit/explosion/pickup feedback, and a long-window browser-runtime proof of life.

Production-preview opening signoff now passes with a stable dedicated Playwright harness, a preview-only debug hook, and a default Canvas2D scene adapter that keeps the shell alive while the Pixi attach path remains deferred.
